
### Valgrind Memcheck  {.smaller}


* similar to AddressSanitizer --- but no compiler modificaitons
* instead: is an emulator (plus alternate malloc/new implementation) 

   * implemented using binary translation (just-in-time compilation)
 
<hr class="vspace" />
* only (reliably) detects errors on heap
* but works on <em>unmodified</em> binariesk
